name: Pork Loin Agrodolce
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Center cut boneless pork loin
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the vinegar, brown sugar, raisins, and apricots.
2. Bring to a boil over low heat, stirring until the brown sugar melts. Let it boil, then lower the heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Remove from the heat and let cool completely.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the garlic and thyme.
4. Make tiny, deep slits all over the pork loin with a sharp knife.
5. Pour the garlic mixture into the slits.
6. Place the pork loin in a nonaluminum dish. Pour the vinegar mixture onto the meat, sprinkle with salt and pepper, turn the meat over to coat it completely, and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or up to overnight, turning the meat several times in the marinade.
7. Remove the plastic wrap and lower the oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Continue roasting until a meat thermometer registers 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Turn off the heat and let the meat rest before carving. Arrange the slices overlapping on a warm serving platter, spooning the cooking juices and fruits over the top, and serve with mashed potatoes.
